goal: Complete feature set and performance polish
summary: Phase 6 complete. Missing features implemented: DiscoverPage (searchable user list + Add Friend), MessagesPage (conversations + DM thread + realtime), TribeDetailPage (tribe info + members). Service worker registered for push notifications. TopBar/BottomNav memoized with requestAnimationFrame scroll debounce. FanZone responsive mobile layout.
stepSummaries:
1. Implement Discover, Messages, Tribe detail pages and add routes [verified]
  2. Add service worker for push notifications [verified]
  3. Add React.memo, scroll debounce, mobile layout fixes [verified]
